mapper.sql: id, process_key, process_name, flow_long_process_id, flow_long_process_version, source_definition_id, source_definition_version, source_type, deployed_by, deployed_by_name, deployed_at
mapper.select: select from flowlong_deployment_record where process_key = #{processKey} order by deployed_at desc nulls last, id desc
mapper.update: update flowlong_deployment_record set process_key = #{processKey}, process_name = #{processName}, flow_long_process_id = #{flowLongProcessId}, flow_long_process_version = #{flowLongProcessVersion}, source_definition_id = #{sourceDefinitionId}, source_definition_version = #{sourceDefinitionVersion}, source_type = #{sourceType}, deployed_by = #{deployedBy}, deployed_by_name = #{deployedByName}, deployed_at = #{deployedAt} where id = #{id}
